name: course-management-system
description: Course Management Subsystem (CMS) for Intelligent Academic Ecosystem

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && cd ..\new-backend && npm install && cd ..\CMS\frontend && npm install

author: Christian A. Claro, Sean Michael V. De Castro, David James B. Ignacio, Ashley Kyla D. Vinzon
